샤넬오픈런	=COUNTIF($D$19:$D,A13)	=COUNTIFS($D$19:$D,A13,$K$19:$K,"발행완료")	=COUNTIFS($D$19:$D,A13,$K$19:$K,"예정")	=COUNTIFS($D$19:$D,A13,$K$19:$K,"실패")	=COUNTIFS($D$19:$D,A13,$K$19:$K,"미게시")	=IFERROR(C13/(B13-D13),"")
